comment:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Mean Green on a backyard project that included a yard clean up and new shrub/tree install. I was pleased how it turned out and so are all of my guest. We had to veer off the original plan a little bit (my fault) but MG had the equipment and personnel skillset to make it seamless. I will be using them in the future.
The below is what really impressed me about this company:
*Showed up on time/detailed plan for work with pricing/communication from the start to finish.
* The office was responsive with any questions that I had.
* Showed up with new material to do the entire  project. No waiting for anything.
* All of their equipment from the trucks to the shovels were clean and in good working order.
* The project manager stayed until the job was almost completed. This ensured everyone was on the same page. She was knowledgeable about all things landscape.
draft_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, Heath. Knowing that the lawn care service met your expectations reinforces the standards we hold every crew to. We appreciate your trust in Black Hill Landscaping.
